docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAVID SPAHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS VINFAST AUTO, LLC AND VINFAST USA DISTRIBUTION, LLLC ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPAHN, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VINFAST AUTO, LLC VINFAST USA DISTRIBUTION, LLC NOTHING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
